measurement_note: Size is n, the required output length. Each target k = 13n forces substantial allocation across the suffix. The Accepted right-to-left greedy allocation and an independent quotient-based constructor take O(n) time. A correct left-to-right implementation that rescans every remaining suffix position to recompute feasible capacity takes O(n^2), completes all 32/128/384-character tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: midpoint value across 32 output characters
benchmark: midpoint value across 128 output characters
benchmark: midpoint value across 384 output characters
